feed.title: App Store Discounts（TR）
feed.subtitle: App Store Discounts - Made with love by appstore-discounts(https://github.com/appstore-discounts/appstore-discounts) feedId:99063474310237184+userId:73658201673997312 feedId:157008924688563200+userId:73658201673997312

entry.title: 🎉 Welcome to subscribe to App Store Discounts
entry.summary: Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!
entry.content:
Thank you for subscribing to our RSS feed. We are a community-driven project dedicated to bringing the latest App Store discount information to users worldwide. Our goal is to ensure that every user can stay up-to-date with the promotional activities of their favorite apps, whether it's price reductions on the apps themselves or limited-time promotions for in-app purchases. We will cover them all for you!

About our RSS feed

  • Focused on delivering App Store app discount information
  • Whenever an app's price drops or in-app purchases go on sale, we will promptly send you a notification
  • Each app's discount information is presented in a separate feed
  • The RSS feed is completely open-source, allowing you to view, contribute, and add your favorite apps at any time

Find Us

App Store Discounts

Finally

If this project has been helpful to you, would you kindly give us a ⭐️

entry.title: Statistical Data Report
entry.content:
Country or Region Tracked

  1. Mainland China(CN)
  2. Hong Kong, China(HK)
  3. Macao, China(MO)
  4. Taiwan, China(TW)
  5. United States(US)
  6. Türkiye(TR)
  7. Portugal(PT)

Statistics of the Number of App Tracked

Category Total Apps Artificially Added Automatically Added Prohibit Push
All 2141 201 1940 100
TR 1983 172 1811 84

View All Apps

Ranking of App Discounts This Month(TR)

Since it supports applications that automatically add tracking based on paid application rankings, most applications are now automatically added, and the quality of the application is unknown and uncontrollable. The current ranking will be used as a reference for subsequent disabling push.

entry.title: All In One Memo
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺199,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺199,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Keep the words, pictures, videos, voice and positions you want to record at any time and anywhere. And there are reminders that you can never forget.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Smart Metronome & Tuner +
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺299,99 → ₺249,99 [₺179,99 ~ ₺299,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺249,99

Application Description

The "Three Essentials" of music practice, unified on one screen. Metronome, Tuner, and Recorder. We have integrated the three indispensable tools for every musician into one elegant and intuitive interface. No more switching between apps—stay fully focussed on your music. - Professional Precision: 1/44,100 sec. Do you have doubts about the accuracy of digital metronomes? Smart Metronome controls timing and sound playback via hardware, not just software. This guarantees an exact pulse, independent of CPU load, with a precision of 1/44,100th of a second. Technically, it is the same as listening to a recorded CD. - Ultra-Realistic Visual Pendulum We have recreated the physical movement of a mechanical metronome. The sound triggers exactly as the pendulum passes through the centre, allowing you to "see" the tempo as well as hear it for intuitive synchronisation. - Exclusive Features to Maximise Your Efficiency *** 3-in-1 Interface: Everything at Once** Tune your instrument while you play. Record your session instantly and analyse rhythmic errors visually thanks to the "Metronome Guide" overlaid on the audio waveform. *** Repeat Mode: Master Difficult Passages** Ideal for tackling tricky sections. Start at a slow tempo and increase the speed automatically. Set the start and goal tempos and the number of repetitions to build your scales and arpeggios with total focus. *** Programme Mode: For Complex Pieces** Freely programme changes in time signature, tempo, and bar counts. Perfect for contemporary music or pieces with shifting rhythms (rit. / accel.). Includes rehearsal marks on screen so you always know where you are in the score. *** Continuous Timer & LOG: Practice Management** Manage your routines with the continuous timer. Every minute of your practice is saved in the LOG, allowing you to visualise your progress and consistency over time. - Key Features at a Glance Unified Interface: Metronome, Tuner, and Recording on a single screen. Customisation: Set your favourite colours and choose from a wide range of sounds. Drum Machine: High-quality percussion and drum sounds. Setlist: Save and organise tempos for your entire repertoire. Versatility: Excellent for music, but also for gym routines or interval training. Make your daily practice more enjoyable, rigorous, and effective with Smart Metronome!

Application Screenshot

iPad

entry.title: Altitude Compass
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺19,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺19,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Altitude Compass is a focused, ad-free compass and altimeter for hiking, camping, and travel records. Core compass and altitude features are free, while Full Version adds an iPhone watermark camera and more personalization. Free core features • View heading, altitude, barometric pressure, coordinates, and nearby addresses • Switch the altitude source between GPS information and the device altimeter when supported • Check level, speed, sunrise, and sunset information • Choose from multiple compass dials, altitude display themes, light or dark appearance, fonts, and units • View altitude with Home Screen, Lock Screen, and StandBy widgets Full Version Choose Full Version when you want to record outdoor photos or further personalize Altitude Display: • High-quality iPhone watermark camera: capture directly with the iPhone camera and apply watermarks to high-resolution camera output rather than a screen or viewfinder capture • Photo information preservation: retain capture time, orientation, location, and other photo information whenever possible for continued recognition and organization in Photos and other apps • Custom watermark content: record altitude, pressure, coordinates, address, direction, time, and notes, with control over each field's visibility and order • HDR watermarked photos: supported iPhones can preserve richer highlight and shadow detail, with an option to save a more widely compatible JPEG instead • Custom background colors for Altitude Display You can try Full Version free for 3 days. The trial does not renew or charge automatically. A one-time in-app purchase permanently unlocks Full Version. There are no subscriptions. Customers who previously purchased the paid app automatically keep Full Version access and do not need to purchase it again. Network and privacy Core features such as heading, sensor altitude, and barometric pressure generally work offline. Nearby addresses, maps, in-app purchases, and purchase restoration require a network connection. The app contains no ads and does not collect personal data. Permissions • Location: GPS altitude, coordinates, speed, sunrise and sunset, maps, and addresses • Motion & Fitness: pressure and altimeter readings on supported devices • Camera and Photos: only when capturing and saving watermarked photos Device capabilities and readings may vary with hardware, system version, environment, and location signal. HDR watermarked photos require iPhone 12 or later with iOS 17 or later. The watermark camera is not available on iPad.

entry.title: Otter - Food & Meal Diary
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺99,99 → ₺49,99 [₺39,99 ~ ₺99,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺49,99

Application Description

Otter is a simple and beautiful food diary app that helps you track what you eat every day. No calorie counting, no complicated databases – just take photos, add notes, and reflect on your eating habits. ◆ WHY OTTER? - Clean, minimal design with an adorable otter character - Photo-based meal tracking – snap and save - No ads, no distractions - iCloud sync across all your devices ◆ FEATURES - Photo Food Journal Capture your meals with photos. A picture is worth a thousand calories – see what you eat at a glance. - Daily Notes Write about your day, how you felt, or what made each meal special. - Water Tracker Stay hydrated! Track your daily water intake with simple tap controls. - Weight Log Monitor your weight trends over time with easy-to-read records. - Timeline View Browse your food history in a beautiful timeline. See patterns in your eating habits. - Search & Stats Find past meals quickly and view your eating statistics. - iCloud Sync Your food diary stays safe and syncs automatically across iPhone, iPad, and Mac. ◆ A MINDFUL APPROACH TO EATING Otter doesn't judge. There's no calorie counting or strict diet plans. Just a gentle companion to help you become more aware of what you eat. You are what you eat – let Otter help you remember it. Questions? Contact us at OtterDietDiary@gmail.com

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Doraemon Dorayaki Shop Story
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺799,99 → ₺499,99 [₺449,99 ~ ₺799,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺499,99

Application Description

A game where you run a sweets shop with the popular manga character Doraemon. Let's make Doraemon's favorite dorayaki and create a store that will be the talk of the town. First, make the sweets, set up the shelves, prepare the tables, and get ready to run the shop! In addition, various characters from Fujiko・F・Fujio's works will appear as customers! Many characters will come, including [T・P BON] and [Kiteretsu Encyclopedia]. During your adventure to find ingredients, you will encounter many difficulties. Even in such a situation, Doraemon's secret gadgets will help you solve difficult problems without any difficulty! A management game created by Kairosoft, a company popular for its simulation games. Enjoy Doraemon's unique adventures.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Bloons TD 5
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Pile O' Monkey Money：₺249,99 → ₺149,99 [₺129,99 ~ ₺249,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺149,99

In-App Purchases

  • Pile O' Monkey Money：₺149,99
  • Tower Unlock All Upgrades：₺49,99
  • Bundle O' Monkey Money：₺149,99
  • 500 Monkey Money：₺49,99
  • Vault O' Tokens：₺499,99
  • Double Cash Mode：₺499,99
  • Vault O' Monkey Money：₺999,99
  • Rank Up：₺49,99
  • Bigger Beacons：₺49,99

Application Description

Five-star tower defense with unrivaled depth and replayability. Now with rewarded leaderboards for even more fun and challenge! The Bloons are back and this time they mean business! Build awesome towers, choose your favorite upgrades, hire cool new Special Agents, and pop every last invading Bloon! Featuring 2 brand new Towers, cool Special Agents, glorious retina graphics, original Tracks and Special Missions, a whole new tier of Specialty Building upgrades, and the powerful Monkey Lab to further upgrade your towers, Bloons TD 5 delivers hours and hours of fun, challenging play to fans and new players alike. Hours and Hours of Awesome Gameplay: * 90+ Tracks * 21 powerful towers with Activated Abilities and 2 upgrade paths * 10 Special Agents * Online Co-op play * Multi-track Odyssey Challenges * Boss Bloon Special Events * 10 Special Missions * 250+ Random Missions * Daily Challenges * New Bloon enemies - tougher Camos, Regrow Bloons, and the fearsome ZOMG * 50+ Game Center Achievements and Challenges * iCloud Support * 3 different game modes * Freeplay mode after mastering a track * 4 difficulty settings and family-friendly theme so anyone can play And that's just the beginning - regular planned updates will keep Bloons TD 5 fresh, fun, and challenging for many months to come. Now it's time to pop some Bloons! Remember to save to iCloud after each victory or purchase to save your progress. iPad version also available - check out Bloons TD 5 HD for full screen UI awesomeness! https://ninjakiwi.com/terms

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Black Border 2
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺29,99 → ₺19,99 [₺19,99 ~ ₺99,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺19,99

Application Description

Inspect papers, prevent smuggling—keep the border safe or profit from corruption. Ready to become a Border Police Officer? Step into the world of Black Border 2: Border Patrol Simulator and experience the intense pressure of national security. As a Customs Officer, your duty is to protect the nation from illegal smuggling. Inspect passports, scrutinize documents, and use advanced tools to make life-or-death decisions in this gripping police simulator game. Take on the duty of a Border Patrol Agent and protect your nation's borders. Your role is crucial: Document Inspection: Meticulously check passports, permits, and papers to approve or reject entrants. Advanced Tools: Utilize X-ray scanners to reveal hidden items and weigh stations to check vehicle legitimacy. Canine Unit: Deploy your loyal service dog to sniff out concealed contraband and uncover secrets. Strategic Decisions: Every choice you make impacts the safety of your country. NEW FEATURES in Black Border 2: Document Inspection: Meticulously check passports and permits to approve or reject entrants as a customs officer. Endless Mode: Test your border patrol skills in a nonstop, challenging experience. Bus Arrivals: Manage large buses and check every passenger's documents carefully. Advanced Scanning: Utilize new X-ray scanners to reveal hidden items and contraband. Weigh Stations: Ensure vehicle weights match their records, a key part of your police duty. Canine Unit: Your faithful service dog is now a crucial partner in finding hidden contraband. Each day as a border inspector brings new challenges that will push your customs police skills to the limit. Are you ready to face the pressure and become a true hero of national security? Download Black Border 2 today and get ready to defend the nation!

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Just a Simple Image Converter
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺9,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺9,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Experience the ultimate image transformation tool with our versatile Image Converter app. Seamlessly convert a wide range of image formats, including JPG, PNG, JPEG, GIF, PDF, WebP, and BMP, all in one convenient application. Whether you need to compress high-resolution images, switch formats for compatibility, or create versatile images for web use, our app has you covered. Enjoy the benefits of bulk image conversion, allowing you to process multiple images simultaneously, saving you time and effort. Our app ensures high-quality conversions with a user-friendly interface, making it suitable for both novice and experienced users. Key Features: Convert images from and to popular formats, including JPG, PNG, JPEG, GIF, PDF, WebP, and BMP. Bulk image conversion for efficient processing. Maintain image quality with high-resolution conversions. Streamlined, easy-to-use interface for a hassle-free experience. Save time and storage space by optimizing your image collection. But that's not all! We also offer seamless sharing options, allowing you to instantly send your converted images to friends, family, or colleagues. Easily share your masterpieces via email, messaging apps, or social media with just a few taps. Enhance your image management and sharing experience by downloading our Image Converter app today. It's the all-in-one solution for your image format conversion and sharing needs.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: SOULVARS
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺249,99 → ₺99,99 [₺99,99 ~ ₺249,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺99,99

Application Description

Deck-Building JRPG "SOULVARS" is now available! 15-20 hours of playtime (+50h to go deeper) Dynamic pixel animation and battles and a rich customization system No In-App Purchases. While having a deep strategic sense, the vertically held smartphone controls allow for simple and exhilarating battles, training, dungeon exploration, and collection of random enchanted items. ▼ Story A world line in which even the fictitious concept of the soul can be converted into data. In return, people's lives are threatened by the sudden appearance of deformities. The protagonists use the Soul Driver, a device that converts souls into data. They are responsible for the elimination of the deformities that threaten people, and work in a certain town... ▼System Overview Number of save slots: 3 (Saved in device and manual save) Estimated scenario completion time: 14 to 20 hours 50 to 100+ hours of post-clearance challenge Features Soul bits (handbills), which are the data of the soul power that resides in gear (equipment), Players can combine them in battle to make special attacks and combos in a successive manner. The characters are characterized by their action with dots that move around. ▼Gear and Soul Bits Soul bits (hand cards) can be drawn from gear (equipment) and used as actions during battle. The combination of main weapon, subweapon, armor, and accessories Strategy (deck) is determined. ▼Arts During a battle, only one soul bit can be selected on the first turn, but The number of soul bits that can be selected at one time increases depending on the opponent's weaknesses, guarding, evading, buffing, debuffing, and various other conditions. The combination of soul bits (cards in hand) selected at the same time activates a skill called Arts.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

iPad

entry.title: Flick Home Run !
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺49,99 → ₺19,99 [₺19,99 ~ ₺49,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺19,99

In-App Purchases

  • PowerLevel_5up：₺199,99
  • AllLevel_5up：₺499,99
  • PowerLevel_1Up：₺49,99
  • ContactLevel_5up：₺199,99
  • EyeLevel_5up：₺199,99
  • ContactLevel_1up：₺49,99
  • AllLevel_1up：₺149,99
  • EyeLevel_1up：₺49,99
  • GOLD BAT：₺799,99
  • Called Shot 50：₺499,99

Application Description

■ ■ ■ Appstore BEST of 2012 (PAID/GROSSING) ■ ■ ■ Flick your finger and make a homerun. You can experience a real baseball batting through the physical pendulum. This is a game in which you can experience various throws based on the pendulum. The ball will fly further if you can hit the ball directly with the quick flick. Experience a “real-life like” batting simulation. ■ Easy Control--------------------------- You only use flick to control the batting for this game. The more accurate you flick your finger to hit the ball; it is more likely that you will be a home-run hitter. The rule is simple. Flick your finger with the same feeling in which you would swing a bat in real life. Think of your finger as a bat, and flick it with speed and accuracy. That’s all. ■ Movement of the ball------------------ Various kinds of throws are materialized into “real-life like” feelings. Different pitches pull out different various kinds of movements. Thus, the batter may miss the timing and would be hard to hit. ■ 10 GAME mode------------------------ You can enjoy this game through 5 kinds of mode. Minor & Major Mode- Hit as many home-runs as you can; as far as you can. Multiplayer Mode- You can compete with other players via Game Center. Moon-Star Mode- Try for a record with the given 9 balls. Training Mode- You can practice with different kinds of pitches. *Bunt mode ( need minor 15step): Drop the ball on the target of the floor correctly. *Total mode ( need bunt 10000 point ) : You’ll meet many different types of the balls from the beginning of the game. *Faster & faster ( need total 25000 point ) : Head-to-head with only fastballs. *Jiant mode ( need F&F 10000 point ) : Match with a Giant pitcher *Cutter mode ( need Jiant 12000 point ) : Match with cutterballs which can cut the baseball bat. ■ add 28 Achievement Bonus-------------- 1 Achievement = 1 level up bonus!!! ■ Level Up System----------------------- You can choose and upgrade 1 of 3 skills every time the exp becomes full.- Power: You can increase the power of the bat Accuracy: You can increase the accuracy of the batting Batting Eye: You can know ahead of the next ball’s pattern ■ Home-Run Tip!--------------------------- 1.Make a full swing with a fast batting-speed! 2.Hit the ball followed from the various thrown pattern with an accurate swing! 3.Let’s keep an eye on the ball until the end and predict the change of the pattern! 4.Let’s be confident and make a full swing! ■ FAQ ------------------------------------- Q : How does STEP UP SYSTEM? A : STEP UP = More balls ex) Minor 1 step = 3 balls Minor 2 step = 6 balls

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: where I put it
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺49,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺49,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

A simple cleanup management app that will quickly find your search! Do you have trouble Looking for items? Find your item quickly with "where I put it”! Build a house, make furniture, assign lockers, and put all your belongings. Books, important collections, hobby tools, children's toys, seasonal clothes, and items of recollections, the app will help you organize all things in the house.

Application Screenshot

iPhone

entry.title: Digline: Cozy Mining
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺99,99 → ₺49,99 [₺49,99 ~ ₺199,99]）

All Price Information

Price：₺49,99

Application Description

Digline is a relaxed and easy to learn drilling game where every descent is a gamble between progress and risk, and the real reward lies deeper underground. Start each run in your workshop, pick your setup, and head down with limited fuel and a scrappy rig. Carve your path through shifting layers of earth, decide what to collect, and choose what to upgrade and what to trade before everything runs out. Each dive reveals new materials, rarer finds, and unexpected patterns beneath the surface. What begins as simple digging gradually turns into a careful balance between exploration, efficiency, and timing. Back at the surface, refine your strategy and improve your runs: • Upgrade your drill, fuel capacity, and efficiency • Unlock new materials with higher value and deeper placement • Optimize routes to maximize each descent Progress builds steadily, but every run carries tension. Go too safe and you leave value behind. Push too far and risk losing it all. Shape your own rhythm underground: short and efficient runs, deep high-risk dives, or a steady climb toward mastering what lies below. Top 10 casual game in the US and UK, Top 5 in Germany, Norway, and others. Come join the fun! What starts as a simple search for resources gradually becomes something stranger. Your old tunnels remain, your map expands over time, and the underground begins to feel less random and more like a place with its own history. Digline is designed to be easy to pick up, fun in short sessions, and rewarding over the long term. Quick digs, short descents, tons of relaxing fun. Features: • intuitive one-finger portrait controls • short runs that fit easily into a minute or two • persistent tunnels and a map that grows with each expedition • multiple underground regions with different materials, hazards, and surprises • resources to gather and use for crafting upgrades, and better preparation • a workshop that turns each successful run into permanent progress • a market system for trading what you bring back • progression that builds across many sessions, not just a single run • a calm, cozy atmosphere with a sense of discovery underneath it • no ads, and no pay-to-win systems • by popular request, you can now purchase fuel if you want to keep on digging, but the game can be completed without any purchase • achievements and Daily Dig leaderboard competition The deeper you go, the more the mine will reveal.

entry.title: Poker Math: Odds & EV Trainer
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺49,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺49,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

Application Description

Become a sharper poker player by mastering the math behind winning decisions. Poker Math turns the numbers every serious player needs into a fast, addictive quiz. Work through 10 progressive levels of 15 questions each. Answer 10 of 15 correctly to pass a level and unlock the next — so the difficulty grows right alongside your skills. Every question comes with a clear, step-by-step explanation, so you’re not just guessing — you’re learning the “why” behind each answer and building intuition you can use at the table. WHAT YOU’LL MASTER • Level 1 — Basic pot math • Level 2 — Pot odds calculations • Level 3 — Drawing odds & outs (the Rule of 2 and 4) • Level 4 — Bluffing math & breakeven frequencies • Level 5 — Expected value (EV) • Level 6 — Advanced pot odds & implied odds • Level 7 — Odds & probabilities • Level 8 — Advanced concepts • Level 9 — Tournament math & ICM • Level 10 — GTO & solver concepts (MDF, minimum defense) FEATURES • 150 hand-crafted questions across 10 levels • Detailed explanation after every question • Progress and best scores saved automatically • Replay any level to beat your high score • Clean, focused design for iPhone and iPad • Portrait and landscape support • 100% offline — no account, no sign-up, no ads WHO IT’S FOR Whether you’re learning the ropes of no-limit hold’em or tightening up your game before your next session, Poker Math meets you where you are and pushes you forward — one level at a time. Study smarter, trust your reads, and start making more +EV decisions today. This app is for educational and entertainment purposes only. It does not offer real-money gambling.

entry.title: Dash for Tesla
entry.content:
Discount Information（Price：₺4,99 → Free [Free ~ ₺299,99]）

All Price Information

Price：Free

In-App Purchases

  • 高级会员（年度）：₺499,99
  • 高级会员（月度）：₺49,99

Application Description

Dash for Tesla is a Bluetooth-based digital dashboard app for users who want to view essential driving information on their phone. No account login, no cloud authorization, and no additional hardware are required. With a supported Bluetooth connection, users can connect locally and view basic information such as vehicle speed and selected vehicle status. Key Features - No account login required No vehicle platform account or password is required, and no remote API authorization is needed. - Local Bluetooth connection Connects through supported Bluetooth capabilities and displays essential information such as speed and selected vehicle status on your phone. - Focused dashboard experience Presents commonly used driving information in a clear and simple layout for quick viewing. - Multiple visual styles Offers different backgrounds and theme styles to match personal preferences. - Local-first design Primarily relies on local Bluetooth communication instead of cloud services, allowing relevant local features to remain available even in weak or offline network conditions. Privacy and Security - No account registration is required. - Vehicle data is not stored long-term on self-hosted servers. - Permissions such as Bluetooth and location are used only for local connection, communication, and related display features. Use Cases - Users who want a simple digital dashboard experience on their phone. - Users who do not want to provide account credentials or rely on cloud-based remote access. - Users who prefer not to install additional hardware devices. Important Notice Dash for Tesla is a third-party independently developed app and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or officially associated with Tesla, Inc. or its affiliates. This app only provides basic information display based on supported Bluetooth capabilities and does not provide any vehicle modification, flashing, or hacking functionality. Subscription Information Dash for Tesla Premium offers auto-renewable subscriptions. Available subscriptions: - Monthly Plan - Yearly Plan Payment will be charged to your Apple ID account at confirmation of purchase. Subscription automatically renews unless it is canceled at least 24 hours before the end of the current period. Your account will be charged for renewal within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period. You can manage or cancel your subscription at any time in your App Store account settings. Privacy Policy: https://tdash.cn/privacy.html Terms of Use: https://www.apple.com/legal/internet-services/itunes/dev/stdeula/

entry.title: Guns'n'Glory Premium
entry.content:
Discount Information

In-App Purchases

  • Unlock Everything：₺399,99 → ₺139,99 [₺139,99 ~ ₺399,99]

All Price Information

Price：₺49,99

In-App Purchases

  • Dakota Map Pack：₺49,99
  • Alaska Map Pack：₺49,99
  • Unlock Everything：₺139,99

Application Description

Who needs heroes when you can play the bad guys? Take up a smart, strategic position and lie in wait at the canyon to ambush settlers, stagecoaches and the gold train. Leave no witnesses! Play this innovative game if you’re bored of standard tower defense games or you’re simply looking for a great mobile game! Get Guns'n'Glory now! Features: • Defense Strategy-Action game with mobile units • Recruit the craziest Wild West Gang ever • Choose between lots of unique units • Upgrade your bandits • Discover new land in Alaska, Nevada and Oregon • Collect mighty power-ups • Arm trains and boats to fight from all side • Awesome cartoon graphics • Fun and innovative gameplay What would the Wild West have been without its charismatic villains? Boring! So take a walk in the cowboy boots of Billy the Kid, Jesse James or Butch Cassidy to become a real, low-down bad guy! Form your own gang by recruiting cool cowboys, crazy Mexicans and brave Indians. Take up a smart, strategic position and lie in wait at the canyon to ambush settlers, stagecoaches and the gold train. Rain bullets, lead and flaming arrows down on the pious pioneers! If your victims look like they might escape, set off in pursuit to stop them from alerting the Sheriff! When you have bagged more than a fistful of dollars, you'll be able to afford cannons or a steam train with a Gatling gun to send around the level! Thank you for playing Guns'n'Glory! Get in touch with HandyGamesTM: http://www.handy-games.com Join us on Facebook: http://www.fb.com/handygames Follow us on Instagram: http://instagram.com/handygames Check news on Twitter: http://www.twitter.com/handy_games Stay tuned on Google+: http://goo.gl/qkjngm Subscribe to our YouTube channel: http://goo.gl/2Kq6yY

iPhone

iPad
